title: VimFu — zt Scroll to Top
description: zt scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the top. Maximize the view of what comes after your cursor.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z T scrolls so your cursor line is at the top of the screen. Use it when you want to read a function from its definition downward.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump to a function, zt ---

steps.say: Go to the progress method. Line fifteen.
The method definition is at the top. The entire body is visible below it. Maximum forward context.
Centered. But half the function body is hidden above. Z T is better for reading ahead.
Z T. Cursor line to the top. Best after jumping to a function or class you want to read through.
